Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A legend in the exploitation genre, these are the films that define director Jack Hill's career.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In space, only the people sitting next to you can hear you scream. So scream loud!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore the dark side of scientific ambition, where unhinged minds push the boundaries of big screen horror.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 2: The Perils of Playing God
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Reckless experiments lead to monstrous results in these horrific Hollywood cult hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 3: Experiments Gone Awry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bikers, Babes, and Badass ACTION: Revisiting the best of 60s and 70s cult cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stay off the streets when these Hollywood stars get behind the wheel.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Open a can of “whoop-ass” with the “Swinging Cheerleaders,” “Sex Kittens,” and ‘Switchblade Sisters”
Video.title: Attack of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Duck You Suckers! It's time for more Grindhouse trailer fun from TFH!
Video.title: Revenge of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Step into the world of horror and sci-fi master John Carpenter with this spine-tingling look at some of his most celebrated films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Roger Corman directed this 1960 sci-fi thriller that follows three people who surface from a scuba expedition to find the entire population has been mysteriously wiped out. Now, the last two surviving men will fight for the Last Woman On Earth!
Video.title: The Last Woman On Earth

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A doctor experimenting with transplant techniques keeps his girlfriend's head alive when she is decapitated in a car crash, then goes hunting for a new body.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers pull their favorite noir films out of the shadows.
Video.title: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Image.alt: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the future with this collection of celebrated classic sci-fi action movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante highlights Hollywood's atomic age paranoia and the nightmares unleashed on unsuspecting audiences.
Video.grandparentTitle: Joe Dante Enters the Atomic Age
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alien conquerors plot to destroy humanity using mind control and the monster Viras. Can Gamera stop this madness??
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Journey back to the 1950s and 60s, where science and imagination brought forth a new wave of classic films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Monsters, aliens, mutants, and more! Who will save us from cinema's most terrifying atomic-era creatures?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's a wild blast from the past, as atomic monsters, aliens, and more invade your living room!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the depths of space (and deeper), comes an all-new collection of intergalactic invaders and futuristic fears!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: High-octane tales of rebels, renegades, and road warriors burning rubber on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stung by the thought of losing her cosmetics empire, a woman goes to extreme and horrific lengths to find a cure for aging.
Video.title: The Wasp Woman

Video.summary: As if America didn’t have enough trouble with its own teens, a group of young aliens arrive in a flying saucer, commit animal cruelty, and plot to make the planet a breeding ground for gargantuan lobster-like monsters.
Video.title: Teenagers from Outer Space

Video.summary: A Hollywood star racing to fund his dream film finds himself battling a ruthless gang determined to shut down the production.
Video.title: Hollywood Man
